peak_hours.peak_session_type: enum: late_night | early_morning | commute | work_hours | evening | scattered

distribution.hourly_counts: array of 24 integers — play count per hour (index = hour)

copy.headline: string — e.g. 'You listen like someone who can't sleep.'
copy.body: string — 1-2 lines about what this temporal pattern suggests

visual.show_full_heatmap: boolean — show all 24 bars or just highlight
visual.highlight_hours: array of integers — which hours to accent
